title: com.temis.flow.evaluated.v1
description: Data payload of a temis decision-flow result event (WP-93, ADR-0026). Written by temisd's sink after a flow evaluation and by temis-clio-worker in answer to a flow command (ADR-0033). The verbatim `descriptor` makes the event self-contained for replay (temis-reaudit). The additive `requestId` is optional so one schema validates both producers.

models.description: Ordered content-addressed modelIds of the flow's steps (provenance).

descriptor.description: The raw flow descriptor, carried verbatim so a re-audit can recompile and replay the flow.

inputHash.description: Stable digest over (flowId, input) — the idempotency key.

requestId.description: Correlation id (ADR-0033): the clio event id of the command that triggered this flow evaluation. Absent on sink-written events.
